title: stephanotis stelostigma
intro: Stephanotis stelostigma, also known as the Madagascar jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the island of Madagascar, characterized by its fragrant white flowers and twining vines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Stephanotis stelostigma include its potential to aid in reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
